message:
🌱 Add podman-container-tools: Feature request: simplify exposing the machine socket on OS mission (#1182)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-container-tools-11462-feature-request-simplify-exposing-the-machine-socke",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-container-tools: Feature request: simplify exposing the machine socket on OS X",
+    "description": "Feature request: simplify exposing the machine socket on OS X. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current podman-container-tools setup",
+        "description": "Verify your podman-container-tools version and configuration:\n```bash\npodman --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working podman-container-tools installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\n**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**\r\n\n**Description**\nI'd like to suggest adding a way to expose the remote machine socket (`/run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock`) more easily. \n\n1."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Feature request: simplify exposing the machine socket on OS…",
+        "description": "> The unix-to-unix over ssh forwarding has been added in my PR.\n> \n>  I feel like gvproxy could be a better tool that services more than just podman; but as long it's stack is statically configured and it has flags for proxying things out of band of the VirtualNetwork's services, it will remain\n```yaml\nsshPort=$(ps -ef | grep -i gvproxy | grep -v grep | sed 's/.*ssh-port //')\n\nssh -i ~/.ssh/podman-machine-default -p $sshPort -L'/tmp/podman.sock:/run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock' -N core@localhost\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Feature request: simplify exposing the machine socket on OS…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "> The unix-to-unix over ssh forwarding has been added in my PR.\n> \n>  I feel like gvproxy could be a better tool that services more than just podman; but as long it's stack is statically configured and it has flags for proxying things out of band of the VirtualNetwork's services, it will remain service-locked to podman.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "sshPort=$(ps -ef | grep -i gvproxy | grep -v grep | sed 's/.*ssh-port //')\n\nssh -i ~/.ssh/podman-machine-default -p $sshPort -L'/tmp/podman.sock:/run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock' -N core@localhost",
+        "Client:\nVersion:      3.3.1\nAPI Version:  3.3.1\nGo Version:   go1.17\nBuilt:        Mon Aug 30 21:15:26 2021\nOS/Arch:      darwin/amd64\n\nServer:\nVersion:      3.3.0\nAPI Version:  3.3.0\nGo Version:   go1.16.6\nBuilt:        Fri Aug 20 21:36:14 2021\nOS/Arch:      linux/amd64"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
